## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences on what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / public API
- [ ] Security-sensitive change (please also see SECURITY.md)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Build / CI / packaging
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] `dotnet build` is green with **zero warnings** in Release.
- [ ] `dotnet test` is green with **zero skipped tests** on a PQ-capable host.
- [ ] `dotnet format --verify-no-changes` is clean.
- [ ] Public API changes have XML doc comments on every member.
- [ ] CHANGELOG `[Unreleased]` updated (when consumer-visible).
- [ ] SECURITY.md / KNOWN-GAPS.md updated when scope or known limitations move.
